childhood.familyBackground: Wexner was born into a family with retail and business interests in Ohio. His parents ran a small women's clothing store.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 웩스너는 오하이오의 소매 및 비즈니스 관심을 가진 가족에 태어났다. 그의 부모는 작은 여성 의류점을 운영했다.
childhood.earlyLife: Wexner took over his parents' clothing store and transformed it into Limited Brands, a major fashion retail empire. He became one of America's most successful fashion retailers.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 웩스너는 부모의 의류점을 인수하고 주요 패션 소매 제국인 Limited Brands로 변환했다.

careerTimeline.event: Took over parents' clothing store and expanded it aggressively
Launched Victoria's Secret, transforming the intimate apparel industry
careerTimeline.eventKo: 빅토리아 시크릿 출시, 친밀한 의류 산업 변환

careerTimeline.event: Stepped back from daily operations while remaining shareholder

failures.description: Several expansion initiatives faced market challenges and failed to meet expectations
failures.descriptionKo: 여러 확장 이니셔티브가 시장 도전에 직면하고 기대를 충족하지 못함
failures.lesson: Retail expansion requires deep market understanding and consumer insight
failures.lessonKo: 소매 확장은 깊은 시장 이해와 소비자 통찰력이 필요하다

quotes.text: Fashion retail is about understanding women and giving them what they want
quotes.textKo: 패션 소매는 여성을 이해하고 그들이 원하는 것을 제공하는 것이다

authored.title: Always Comes Back to the Customer
authored.why: Shares his philosophy on customer-centric retail leadership
authored.whyKo: 고객 중심의 소매 리더십 철학 공유

recommended.title: The Power of Moments
recommended.author: Chip Heath and Dan Heath
recommended.note: Informed his approach to creating memorable customer experiences
recommended.noteKo: 기억할 만한 고객 경험 창출에 대한 접근 방식을 알림

personalTraits.knownFor: Fashion retail leadership; Victoria's Secret founder; Limited Brands CEO
personalTraits.knownForKo: 패션 소매 리더십; 빅토리아 시크릿 창립자; Limited Brands CEO
personalTraits.philanthropy: Major philanthropist supporting education and cultural institutions
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 교육 및 문화 기관을 지원하는 주요 자선가
personalTraits.controversies: Faced public criticism related to business practices and personal conduct in later years
personalTraits.controversiesKo: 후년의 비즈니스 관행 및 개인적 행동과 관련하여 공개적 비판 직면
